items.prompt: recognizes when two quantities are in a proportional relationship and when they are not
items.expected_evidence: identify whether paired quantities scale proportionally in bounded cases
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner classifies proportional structure correctly.

items.prompt: explains invariant multiplicative structure rather than relying on repeated additive change
items.expected_evidence: justify why equal additive differences do not by themselves establish proportionality
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains the invariant multiplicative relationship.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to additive_pattern_misclassification.
items.expected_evidence: justify why equal additive differences do not by themselves establish proportionality
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner distinguishes additive patterning from proportional structure.

items.prompt: succeeds across ratio tables, missing-value tasks, and simple constant-of-proportionality contexts
items.expected_evidence: coordinate one-unit reasoning with equivalent-ratio growth across multiple representations
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves proportional reasoning across representation changes.
